languages.text: "Слишком похоже на ловушку. Я в нее не попадусь. Равор, уводите флагман".
"Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."
languages.original_text: "Слишком похоже на ловушку. Я в нее не попадусь. Равор, уводите флагман".

traits.locale_text: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."
"Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."
"Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."

languages.text: 「この罠にはまりそう。私はこの罠にはまりたくない。ラヴォル、この場所から離れる航路を設定する」
languages.original_text: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."

languages.text: "Bana gayet tuzak gibi geldi. Buna düşmeyi reddediyorum. Ravor, rotayı buradan uzaklaştır."
languages.original_text: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."

traits.locale_text: "Bana gayet tuzak gibi geldi. Buna düşmeyi reddediyorum. Ravor, rotayı buradan uzaklaştır."

languages.text: “这看起来太像陷阱了，我可不会自投罗网。雷沃，设定航线离开这里。”
languages.original_text: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."

traits.locale_text: “这看起来太像陷阱了，我可不会自投罗网。雷沃，设定航线离开这里。”

languages.text: "Das riecht nach einer Falle. Und ich habe nicht vor, hineinzutappen. Ravor, setzt einen Kurs, der uns von hier wegbringt."
languages.original_text: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."

traits.locale_text: "Das riecht nach einer Falle. Und ich habe nicht vor, hineinzutappen. Ravor, setzt einen Kurs, der uns von hier wegbringt."

languages.text: « Ça sent le piège à plein nez. Je refuse d'y risquer ne serait-ce qu'un orteil. Ravor, changez de cap et éloignez-nous d'ici. »
languages.original_text: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."

traits.locale_text: « Ça sent le piège à plein nez. Je refuse d'y risquer ne serait-ce qu'un orteil. Ravor, changez de cap et éloignez-nous d'ici. »

languages.text: «Es claramente una trampa. No caeré en ella. Ravor, trace un rumbo que nos aleje de aquí».
languages.original_text: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."

traits.locale_text: «Es claramente una trampa. No caeré en ella. Ravor, trace un rumbo que nos aleje de aquí».
